ksa_text: Develop and deliver data and AI literacy programs for organizational audiences, including curriculum and training material design, on-the-job training programs, delivery facilitation, and effectiveness assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document User Experience (UX) requirements including information architecture and user interface requirements.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data remediation tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of data remediation tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-006 (OP, Task) maps to Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4584 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.458, nist_ai_rmf=0.452, ddat=0.427. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4584 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-006 (OP, composite 0.4584) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4584 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4584 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4584, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
